commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Protected maintainer-labeled, upgrade-sensitive persisted-state migration needs human review and real upgrade proof rather than an automated repair lane.; Cleared: The diff does not add dependencies, workflows, secret handling, downloaded code, or broader execution permissions; the security-sensitive part is ordinary local state-file migration. commands.review_summary:
This PR moves task and task-flow persistence from shipped sidecar SQLite files into the shared OpenClaw state database, with doctor/startup migration and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +431, Tests +441. Total +872 across 29 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a storage refactor PR. The important missing proof is a real upgrade run from released sidecar state, not a current-main failing repro.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Protected maintainer-labeled, upgrade-sensitive persisted-state migration needs human review and real upgrade proof rather than an automated repair lane.
